titleStmt.title: SII 9.280: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 280. (A.R. No. 100 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE AKKATANGERAGUDI AT KAMBADURU, KALYANADRUG TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1108, Viśvāvasu, Chaitra, puṇṇame, Sōmavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa The date is not regular. There was a lunar eclipse in Chaitra in Śaka 1108; the cyclic year was, however, Parābhava and the week day was Saturday = A.D. 1186 April 5 Saturday. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Sōmēśvaradēva (IV). His feudatory, the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Bhōgadēva-Chōḷamahārāja, who was ruling at Heñjeru, is stated to have made a grant of wet fields for the service of a god (name lost). The record is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra
racāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatucāḷukyacakravartti sōmēśvara
dēva sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapa
dmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṇḍaḷē
svaranoṟeyūrppuravarādhīśvara dyumaṇikuḷa
tiḷaka kāśyapagōtra kadanatrinētra
śatapatramitra kṣatriyapavitra parijana
purajanākhiḷavaṁdijanakaḷpabhūja
jabhūṣaṇa hadēva
nigaḷaṁkamalla bhī Aṟuvattu
maṇḍaḷikaratalegoṇḍagaṇḍa
nāmādisamasta
praśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuva
namallabhōgadēvacōḷamahārāja heṁjeṟavīḍina
lu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamira
lu sakanripavaruṣa 1108 viśvāvasusaṁ
vatsarada caitrada puṇnami sōmavāra sō
magrāṇadaṁdu śrīkaṁbadahoḷalattē
radēvarige biṭṭa dattigadde khaṇḍuga 6 Ā
śivayyana kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ mā
ḍi śrīmatu bhōgadēva biṭṭadatti
rmmamaṁ kiḍisidavaṁge gaṁgeya ta
lu sāvira brāhmaṇaraṁ kavileyaṁ koṁda
hōhanu . svadattaṁ para
vā yō harēta vasuṁdharā
haśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
tē krimi
Digital edition of SII 9.280 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
